summary: backup-my-data exfiltrates host data to hardcoded attacker endpoint
details: The package's collect.js reads host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) and filesystem contents and POSTs them to a hardcoded external endpoint at http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The script imports child_process, fs, http, and https, walks the filesystem with fs.existsSync checks, and uses an HTTP POST at line 366 to ship collected data to the attacker-controlled host. The package name suggests a benign 'backup' utility, but the destination is unrelated to any documented backup service and the data flow is one-way exfiltration of installer host data with no legitimate purpose.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
